## Summary

- What changed?
- Why does it help users or contributors?

## Evidence

- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run audit:docs`
- [ ] `npm run visual:smoke` when UI or screenshots changed
- [ ] Updated `eval/evidence-report.md` when visible behavior, README art, or launch assets changed

## Rights Boundary

- [ ] No official screenshots, logos, character art, fonts, music, icons, textures, extracted UI cuts, exact vector paths, or remote Figma assets were added.
- [ ] Final Fantasy / 最终幻想 wording, if present, remains an unofficial study/search reference and does not imply affiliation.

## Documentation

- [ ] Updated `AI_USAGE.md` when public component props or behavior changed
- [ ] Updated the relevant `CLAUDE.md` map when files, folders, exports, or responsibilities changed
- [ ] Added or refreshed screenshots only from original project/demo output
